title: Field-Guide Outcomes, Command Language, and REPL Contract · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs field-guide outcomes, command language, and repl contract from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded field-guide product and REPL charter after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.
Specify command names, argument grammar, whitespace policy, help text, aliases, unknown-command behavior, and stable output contracts.
Model start, prompt, read, parse, dispatch, result, continue, EOF, quit, cancellation, and cleanup as explicit session states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.text: A review Go team handles case 9757 during a race-instrumented cache stress case. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate a useful, bounded, accessible REPL contract on observable command and lifecycle evidence; failed and canceled commands must preserve the prior admitted state; then change one resource identity, pagination link, JSON field, status, or body budget and revalidate admission. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define learner, field user, decision, command sequence, accepted latency, failure consequence, and observable value before coding.

Competency probe: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.

For Pokedex product engineering and Go Record what required effort · Review Pokedex Go Acceptance Evide…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A screenshot of a successful command is sufficient acceptance evidence.
